text: John Doe walked along Main Street and noticed a mysterious stranger dressed in black.
The stranger offered John Doe a quest and hinted at secrets hidden beneath the city.

Desscaras stepped through the narrow streets of Morvin as the evening bells echoed from the distant watchtower. Most of the townspeople had already retreated indoors, fearful of the strange Majik sightings that had become increasingly common over the past month.

She paused near the old market square and studied the glowing symbol etched into a stone archway. According to local rumors, the mark had first appeared shortly after a traveler known only as the Stranger arrived in town. While the townsfolk viewed the symbol as a warning, Desscaras suspected it was connected to a forgotten network of portals hidden beneath Morvin.

Determined to learn more, she recorded the location in her journal before continuing toward the abandoned library on the northern edge of the city.
